zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Cheyne是William Cheney和Joan Beauchamp的兒子，出生。他於1320年與Emma在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年在英國巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Cheyne是William Cheney和Joan Beauchamp的儿子，出生。他于1320年与Emma在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年在英国巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Cheyne was born as the son of William Cheney and Joan Beauchamp. He married Emma in 1320, in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1368, in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England, and was buried in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas CheyneはWilliam CheneyとJoan Beauchampの息子として生まれた。1320年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップでEmmaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップで死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cheyne(은)는 William Cheney(와)과 Joan Beauchamp의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에서 Emma(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 영국 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Cheyne родился. Его родителей звали William Cheney и Joan Beauchamp. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma в 1320 г. в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1368 г. в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
